## Aba: Problem analysis

|   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  | Instructions:  Start by stating your niche and then briefly descirbe your niches current situation (where they're at now), their 
desired situation (where they want to be) and what's blocking them from achieving  it on their own.  Now dissect the overall 
problem into it's specific components/parts and analyse each piece on the chart to the right.  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Offer analysis worksheet | Click here for Google Doc (Click 'file' > 'Make a copy') |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Niche: | Plumbers |  | Problem name | Problem explanation | Fix or prevent | Awareness level (1-5) | P-Score |
|  |  |  | Getting a mixture of job types | When using dm plumbers get all types of jobs | Fix | 2. Aware of problem/need | 1 |
| Current situation: |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Plumbers current get clients through the yellow pages, referrals and
basic online advertising that targets all types of plumbing jobs.  They
get a mixture of jobs from online advertising, some that they don't want
and their offline advertising methods are declining in effectiveness. |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Desired situation: |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Plumbers desire to have a more predictable flow of high value clients
from online advertising, specifically hot water cylinder repair jobs since
they are the most profitable.  They want to have a trusted person to 
manage all their digital marketing so that they can just forget about it
and do what they're good at which is plumbing jobs.   |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Blocker: |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Plumbers work on fixing pipes and water leaks, not digital marketing
and technology.  Plumbers don't have the skills or the time to start
doing their own digital marketing and they want to trust somebody else
to do it for them.  The problem is that they have tried different people
but they don't know what they're doing and the results are average.  
Plumbers feel trapped in this place. |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

## Aba: Problemfeaturebenefit analysis

|   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  | Instructions:  Describe the specific feature that is intended to solve this problem.  Then describe the specific benefit that your client will gain 
when the feature is applied to this problem.  Finally, rank each specific problem/feature/benefit for it's uniqueness and value and then observe 
the F-Score which is assigned to each item. |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Offer analysis worksheet | Click here for Google Doc (Click 'file' > 'Make a copy') |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Problem name | Fix or prevent | P-Score | Feature name | Feature description | Benefit name | Benefit description | Uniqueness | Value | F-Score |
| Getting a mixture of job types | Fix | 1 | Specific job targeting | Creating ad campaigns to get specific jobs | High value jobs | Only getting high hot water cylinder repair jobs | 1 | 1 | 1 |

|  |  |  | Instructions:  Describe the service delivery required to fulfill on this particular feature, the person(s) required to fulfil it, the complexity of the 
task and the time taken to complete the task.  Once you've entered that, observe the S-Score and E-Score provided to you so that you can 
determine the efficiency of each service component.   |  |  |  |  |  |  |

| Specific job targeting | Creating ad campaigns to get specific jobs | 1 | Setting up Adwords campaign, landing pages etc. | John Doe | 5 | 5 | 5 | 5 | 5 |
